tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: teammate_A asked if I could do their part since they're busy. It's a small favor, but it means less work for me and keeps our team harmony intact.

desires: Keep the team harmony intact by accepting this small favor without making teammate_A feel guilty or awkward.
Ensure I don't look unreliable to my close friends in cohort_3 if they notice I'm taking on extra work, even though it drains me.

goals.description: Accept teammate_A's offer to help with their part, explicitly stating that it would be awkward for them to do it themselves, to preserve harmony.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) outweighs my physical stamina (6). I cannot risk damaging the relationship or making them feel guilty, even though accepting this extra work drains me and conflicts with my plan to finish my own share by 13:00.

goals.description: Proceed to complete my assigned project share immediately after the conversation, prioritizing reliability to cohort_3 over efficiency.
goals.rationale: I need to appear responsible to my close friends (closeness 7), but since I've already committed to helping, I will defer the optimization of my schedule. The social cost of looking unreliable is too high.
